user.title: Connect to Notion
user.description: Enter your Notion API token. [Create an integration here]({setup_url})

parent_page.title: Setup Garden Care Database
parent_page.description: Create a page in Notion, connect your integration to it, and paste the page URL or ID here. The integration will create the Garden Care database automatically.

data.add_example_plants: Add example plants (Tomatoes, Rose Bush, Apple Tree, Basil)
data.create_plant_sensors: Create individual sensors for each plant

database.title: Connect Existing Database
database.description: If you already have a Garden Care database, paste its URL or ID here.

ai_config.title: AI Configuration
ai_config.description: Select an AI conversation agent to enable the 'Add Plant' feature. The AI will automatically fill in plant care information based on your Home Assistant location (coordinates, elevation, country, timezone). You can skip this step and configure it later.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Notion. Please check your token.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid authentication. Please check your Notion token.

abort.already_configured: This Notion integration is already configured

init.title: AI Configuration
init.description: Select an AI conversation agent to enable the 'Add Plant' feature. The AI will automatically fill in plant care information based on your Home Assistant location.
